message:
fix(orchestrator): Improve merge delta duplicate detection

When processing merge deltas, the orchestrator now checks if the merged
content already exists (exact hash or high Jaccard similarity) before
creating a new bullet. This prevents duplicate rules when merging.

Changes:
- Added isActiveBullet(), findFirstHashMatch(), findBestActiveSimilarBullet()
- Merge handling now checks for existing similar content first
- If match found, deprecate source bullets into existing rule
- If no match, create new merged bullet as before

Also in playbook.ts:
- Enhanced addBullet() to validate requested IDs don't already exist
- Throws clear error if duplicate ID provided
